description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build on Emscripten that runs on every push to main and on pull requests to main. Use a single ubuntu-latest job in a mogemimi/gamedev-emscripten container with a bash shell, checking out the repository with submodules and a fetch depth of 50. Then, set environment variables, show the Emscripten Compiler version, generate Ninja files for Debug and Release build configurations using cmake, build with ninja, and run tests with node.
